title: [Hot and Steamy Bakery] Euphoria of Coveted Love (MGS)
description:
Leaf, a bottom of the barrel grunt member of an Italian mafia organization, secretly covets and lusts after his Boss's signora, Camelia.
Despite being someone who is a restricted realm that one mustn't ever trespass, Leaf is unable to hold back his expression of nightly desire for the Signora. Yes, this is something akin to a plague...
'Desire shall lead thou to the pits of despair, so– oh, one who reached out his hand into the inviolable grounds, the wrath of the heavens shall smite down upon thee.'
Raws: https://www.mrblue.com/webtoon/wt_000071039
author: EVY
